positive: A mesmerizing, stylized pattern of interconnected flora and fauna, featuring abstract geometric interpretations of vines, hummingbirds, and crescent moons. The style should be inspired by art nouveau and psychedelic stained glass, rendered with strong, contrasting silhouettes and intricate linework. Use a limited, rich color palette: deep indigo, emerald green, aged gold, and burnt orange. The composition must be highly repeatable and symmetrical, ideal for full textile coverage. Clean vector aesthetic, crisp lines, high contrast, graphic design, centered and repeating pattern.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logos, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, smudge, out of frame
